title: Mecha
description: Turning iron golem into iron mess that all villagers call Mecha
body:
🎃 This Resource Pack turning _iron golem_ into iron mess that all villagers call **Mecha**...
![Mecha](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4331f46efbee1677413673540544eecea55ba61b.png)

# 
**Changes:**
- 🎨 new golem texture
- 🎵 new golem sounds
# 

🎃 **Mecha** seems to be more... alive than iron golem... she covered in eyes so dont even try hurt _villagers_ in her presence
